title: Workspace State
description: The workspace's current runtime state. Conforms to the lifecycle declared in workspace/_contract.json.

status.description: Current lifecycle state. Must be one of the states declared in workspace/_contract.json.

current_workflow_stage.description: Current stage in the workspace's workflow (if it has one). Reference to a stage name in workspace/_contract.json.

domain_hint.description: Free-text tag for human navigation, e.g. 'personal-todo'.

blueprint.description: Name of the blueprint this workspace was scaffolded from, if any.
